steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: Pico honors nature within his tribe's beliefs but simultaneously expresses distaste for wilderness—two contradictory positions held at the same time. The word must capture both.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
Ambivalence names the state of holding opposing feelings—which Pico demonstrates through simultaneous cultural reverence and personal aversion to nature. The other options describe singular attitudes rather than this contradiction.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
